student_verification.name: Soniya Malviya
student_verification.declaration: I confirm that all LLM interactions listed below are complete and accurate, and that all decisions regarding ablation choices, failure mode identification, and honest reflection are my own.

interactions.prompt: Can you help me understand what the step-by-step flow of NBSVM is, from raw text to prediction?
interactions.response_summary: Explained the pipeline: tokenise → binarize → compute r (Eq 2) → MNB or SVM on scaled features → interpolate (Eq 4).
interactions.student_modification: N/A — code was rewritten based on conceptual guidance only

interactions.prompt: What is the difference between MNB and standard NB in this paper?
interactions.response_summary: Clarified that MNB uses multinomial event model (count of each word) vs Bernoulli NB (binary occurrence). Both binarized in this paper.
interactions.student_modification: N/A — code was rewritten based on conceptual guidance only

interactions.prompt: What does w_bar mean in Equation 4?
interactions.response_summary: Explained w_bar = ||w||_1 / |V| is the mean absolute weight magnitude, used as a shrinkage target.
interactions.student_modification: N/A — code was rewritten based on conceptual guidance only
